pi_items.source: Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 12, verified against env.json user 'ga' home directory configuration
Confirmed in env.json mounts section: examples/android_studio_env/data mounted to /workspace/data in read-only mode
Verified by reading actual source files: NotepadActivity.kt, NoteFormatter.kt, NoteValidator.kt, Note.kt located at com/example/notepad package
Verified in verifier.py lines 5-12 documenting 4 planted bugs, and setup_task.sh lines 39-129 showing injection of all 4 bugs via string replacement

pi_items.verified_value: NotepadActivity.kt: formatter and validator declared as lateinit var but never initialized
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 40-41 change initialization from 'val formatter = NoteFormatter()' to 'lateinit var formatter: NoteFormatter', verifier.py lines 108-143 checks for initialization patterns

pi_items.verified_value: NoteFormatter.kt: unsafe substring(0, maxLength) call added before length check causing crash on short content
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 48-75 injects unsafe substring call via Python script that replaces safe take() with unsafe substring(), verifier.py lines 145-169 checks substring pattern

pi_items.verified_value: NoteValidator.kt: isNoteComplete() method calls itself recursively instead of returning true
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 78-102 replaces final 'return true' with 'return isNoteComplete(note)', verifier.py lines 171-201 extracts method body and checks for recursive calls

pi_items.verified_value: Note.kt: charCount() method attempts Integer.parseInt() on concatenation of content length and color value
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 109-129 replaces charCount implementation with version using Integer.parseInt(cleaned.length.toString() + color.toString()), verifier.py lines 203-233 checks for parseInt pattern

pi_items.verified_value: Original data in /workspace/data/NotepadApp contains CLEAN source code - NO bugs present
pi_items.source: Directly read NotepadActivity.kt (lines 14-15 show initialized val), NoteFormatter.kt (lines 56-60 safe take()), NoteValidator.kt (line 62 returns true), Note.kt (lines 39-41 uses .length directly)

pi_items.verified_value: Bugs are dynamically injected during setup via setup_task.sh using sed and Python string replacements
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 39-129 show four distinct injection phases using sed -i and Python scripts to modify source files

pi_items.verified_value: 70 points out of 100 required to pass

pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 235-251: compilation check worth 25 points

privileged_info_summary: The NotepadApp task is a synthetic debugging challenge with 4 intentionally injected runtime bugs in Kotlin source files. The original data contains clean, correct implementations of NoteFormatter.formatPreview(), NoteValidator.isNoteComplete(), NotepadActivity initialization, and Note.charCount(). During task setup, four bugs are dynamically injected via string replacement: (1) NotepadActivity formatter/validator changed to uninitialized lateinit declarations, (2) NoteFormatter.formatPreview() unsafe substring(0, maxLength) added, (3) NoteValidator.isNoteComplete() recursive call injected, and (4) Note.charCount() uses unsafe Integer.parseInt() with color concatenation. Task runs with user 'ga' (password 'password123'), project directory at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NotepadApp, package path com/example/notepad, and requires 70+ out of 100 points to pass (including 25 points for compilation).
